features: Safety Material:Food Grade and Environmentally Friendly Silicone Material.These facial clean brushes made from food grade anti-bacterial silicone. Super soft not to hurt the skin. anti-oxidation, and durable.

Multi-Functional 3 in 1:Deep Cleansing (Remove makeups easily with exquisite foams); Skin Massaging (Massage your face skin to promote blood circulation or after spa); Gentle face Exfoliate Brush (exfoliate your skin to open pores and gently remove impurities and dead skin)
Easy to Foam:Build-in Foaming Cotton, easy to get Exquisite foams, easy to dry and Anti-microbial, no more allergies and keep your face exfoliate brush dry and clean.
Portable:Cute octopus shape, it's easy to hold and move around while cleaning your face. Small size make it convenient to carry and easier to use. Suitable for daily use or travel.
description: Product description Features Cute little Octopus shape, easy to hold. It not only cleans your face, but also massages your face. Exfoliate, clean pores, shrink pores. Reduce oily skin oil, dead skin, acne Material: Silicone Applicable people: all people Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Package Included 3 x face cleaning brush Directions 1. Wet the brush with warm water. 2. Apply your favorite cleanser to brush. 3. Gently massage face in circular motions for 30-60 seconds. 4. Rinse and thoroughly. 5. Allow air dry. Use 1-2 times a day best results. The can also be used remove makeup promote blood circulation. Safety Warning Always use gently, avoid contact with eyes, and store in a dry place after use. Do not share this brush with others to prevent cross-contamination. See more
